markdown.markdown:
### Packages

```{r setup}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(sf)
  library(arrow)
  library(units)
  library(gt)
  library(RColorBrewer)
  library(viridis)
  library(scales) # for cut_number
})
```

### Climate Periods

```{r climate-periods}

# Climatological Standard Reference Period Normals
crp_beg <- 1961
crp_end <- 1990
crp_lbl <- paste("CRP ", crp_beg, "-", crp_end, sep = "")

# Climatological Period Average
cpa_beg <- 2011
cpa_end <- 2020
cpa_lbl <- paste("CPA ", cpa_beg, "-", cpa_end, sep = "")
```

### Paths

```{r paths}
dir_transform <- "_data/2-transform/"
```

### Read transformed data

```{r read-crp-saved-data}

cp <- "crp"

pth <- paste(dir_transform, cp, "-nc-summary.csv", sep = "")
crp_nc_summary_df <- read_csv(pth, show_col_types = FALSE) 

pth <- paste(dir_transform, cp, "-monthly-data-t.parquet", sep = "")
crp_t_df <- read_parquet(pth) 
pth <- paste(dir_transform, cp, "-monthly-data-p.parquet", sep = "")
crp_p_df <- read_parquet(pth) 
pth <- paste(dir_transform, cp, "-average-stats-t.parquet", sep = "")
crp_t_stats_df <- read_parquet(pth) 
pth <- paste(dir_transform, cp, "-average-stats-p.parquet", sep = "")
crp_p_stats_df <- read_parquet(pth) 
pth <- paste(dir_transform, cp, "-climate-normals.parquet", sep = "")
crp_cn_df <- read_parquet(pth) 

cp <- "cpa"

pth <- paste(dir_transform, cp, "-nc-summary.csv", sep = "")
crp_nc_summary_df <- read_csv(pth, show_col_types = FALSE) 

pth <- paste(dir_transform, cp, "-monthly-data-t.parquet", sep = "")
cpa_t_df <- read_parquet(pth) 
pth <- paste(dir_transform, cp, "-monthly-data-p.parquet", sep = "")
cpa_p_df <- read_parquet(pth) 
pth <- paste(dir_transform, cp, "-average-stats-t.parquet", sep = "")
cpa_t_stats_df <- read_parquet(pth) 
pth <- paste(dir_transform, cp, "-average-stats-p.parquet", sep = "")
cpa_p_stats_df <- read_parquet(pth) 
pth <- paste(dir_transform, cp, "-climate-normals.parquet", sep = "")
cpa_cn_df <- read_parquet(pth) 

```


## Explore data

```{r summary-table-data}

joined_df <- crp_t_df %>%
  select(lat, lon, mth, t) %>%
  rename(t1 = t) %>%
  inner_join(cpa_t_df %>% select(lat, lon, mth, t) %>% rename(t2 = t),
             by = c("lat", "lon", "mth")) %>%
  inner_join(crp_p_df %>% select(lat, lon, mth, p) %>% rename(p1 = p),
             by = c("lat", "lon", "mth")) %>%
  inner_join(cpa_p_df %>% select(lat, lon, mth, p) %>% rename(p2 = p),
             by = c("lat", "lon", "mth"))

fn_create_summary_table_4x <- function (df, title, subtitle, lbl1, lbl2) {

  summary_df <- tibble(
    Metric = c(
      "Data points",
      "Max longitude",
      "Min longitude",
      "Max latitude",
      "Min latitude",
      "Climate Variable Avg",
      "Climate Variable Max",
      "Climate Variable Min"
    ),
    CRP_t = c(
      nrow(df),
      max(df$lon, na.rm = TRUE),
      min(df$lon, na.rm = TRUE),
      max(df$lat, na.rm = TRUE),
      min(df$lat, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean(df$t1, na.rm = TRUE),
      max(df$t1, na.rm = TRUE),
      min(df$t1, na.rm = TRUE)
    ),
    CPA_t = c(
      nrow(df),
      max(df$lon, na.rm = TRUE),
      min(df$lon, na.rm = TRUE),
      max(df$lat, na.rm = TRUE),
      min(df$lat, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean(df$t2, na.rm = TRUE),
      max(df$t2, na.rm = TRUE),
      min(df$t2, na.rm = TRUE)
    ),
    CRP_p = c(
      nrow(df),
      max(df$lon, na.rm = TRUE),
      min(df$lon, na.rm = TRUE),
      max(df$lat, na.rm = TRUE),
      min(df$lat, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean(df$p1, na.rm = TRUE),
      max(df$p1, na.rm = TRUE),
      min(df$p1, na.rm = TRUE)
    ),
    CPA_p = c(
      nrow(df),
      max(df$lon, na.rm = TRUE),
      min(df$lon, na.rm = TRUE),
      max(df$lat, na.rm = TRUE),
      min(df$lat, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean(df$p2, na.rm = TRUE),
      max(df$p2, na.rm = TRUE),
      min(df$p2, na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  )
 
  summary_tbl <- summary_df %>%
    gt() %>%
      fmt_number(
        columns = c(CRP_t, CPA_t, CRP_p , CPA_p),
        decimals = 0,
        use_seps = TRUE,
          rows = Metric == "Total rows"
      ) %>%
      fmt_number(
        columns = c(CRP_t, CPA_t, CRP_p , CPA_p),
        decimals = 2,
        rows = Metric %in% c(
          "Max longitude", "Min longitude",
          "Max latitude", "Min latitude"
        )
      ) %>%
      fmt_number(
        columns = c(CRP_t, CPA_t, CRP_p , CPA_p),
        decimals = 3,
        rows = Metric %in% c(
          "Climate Variable Avg",
          "Climate Variable Max",
          "Climate Variable Min"
        )
      ) %>%
      tab_spanner(
        label = "Temperature (°C)",
        columns = c(CRP_t,CPA_t)
      ) %>%
      tab_spanner(
        label = "Precipitation (mm)",
        columns = c(CRP_p,CPA_p)
      ) %>%
      cols_label(
        CRP_t = lbl1,
        CPA_t = lbl2,
        CRP_p = lbl1,
        CPA_p = lbl2
      ) %>%
      tab_header(
        title = title
        # ,
        # subtitle = subtitle
      ) %>%
      tab_style(
        style = list(
          cell_fill(color = "lightyellow")
        ),
        locations = cells_body(
          rows = Metric %in% c(
            "Climate Variable Avg"
          )
        )
      )

  return(summary_tbl)
}

title <- "Summary of Input Climate Variables"
lbl1 <- crp_lbl
lbl2 <- cpa_lbl
tbl1_gt <- fn_create_summary_table_4x(joined_df, title, subtitle, lbl1, lbl2)
tbl1_gt

```

## Exploratory Plots

```{r read-coastline}
dir <- dir_transform
fil <- "global-coastline.gpkg"
pth <- paste(dir, fil, sep = "")
coastline_sf <- st_read(pth, quiet=TRUE)

```

### Climate Variable

```{r expl-cv-plot}

fn_explore_cv_plot <- function(df, cp) {
  if (cp == "t") {
    cv_df <- df |> 
       select(lon, lat, tavg) |> 
       rename(cv = tavg)
    cv_title <- paste("Average Temperature ", crp_lbl)
    all_colors <- rev(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))
    cv_colors <- all_colors[c(4, 5, 7, 8, 9)]    
    cv_units <- "°C"
  } else {
    cv_df <- df |> 
       select(lon, lat, ptot) |> 
       rename(cv = ptot)  
    cv_title <- paste("Average Precipitation ", crp_lbl)
    cv_colors <- brewer.pal(5, "Blues") 
    cv_units <- "mm"
  }
  qs <- quantile(cv_df$cv, probs = seq(0, 1, length.out = 6), na.rm = TRUE)  
  labs <- sprintf("[%.1f, %.1f]", qs[-6], qs[-1]) 
  cv_df <- cv_df %>%
    mutate(p_bin = cut(cv, breaks = qs, include.lowest = TRUE, labels = labs))

  cv_plt <- ggplot(cv_df, aes(lon, lat, fill = p_bin)) +
    geom_raster(alpha = 0.85) +
    geom_sf(data = coastline_sf,
      color = "black", linewidth = 0.15,
      inherit.aes= FALSE, show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = cv_colors,
      name = cv_units, 
      guide = guide_legend(
        reverse = TRUE,       # high value bin at top
        override.aes = list(
          alpha = 0.85,        # legend bins semi-transparent
          colour = "black",   # legend bins outline
          size = 0.4          # legend bins outline line width
        )   
      )   
    ) +
    coord_sf(expand=FALSE) +
    labs(
      title = cv_title,
      x = "",
      y = "") +
    theme_minimal() +
    # make legend bins boxes
    theme(legend.key = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA)) 
 return (cv_plt)
}
p1t_exp_t_crp <- fn_explore_cv_plot(crp_cn_df,"t")
p1t_exp_p_crp <- fn_explore_cv_plot(crp_cn_df,"p")
p1t_exp_t_crp
p1t_exp_p_crp 
```

### Climate variable changes

```{r expl-cv-plot-chg}

fn_cv_chg_vis <- function(df1, df2, cp) {
  if (cp == "t") {
    cv_df1 <- df1 |> select(lon, lat, tavg) |> rename(cv = tavg)
    cv_df2 <- df2 |> select(lon, lat, tavg) |> rename(cv = tavg)
    cv_title <- paste("Temperature Changes ", cpa_lbl, " vs ", crp_lbl)
    all_colors <- rev(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))
    cv_colors <- all_colors[c(4, 5, 7, 8, 9)]  
    cv_units <- "°C"
  } else {
    cv_df1 <- df1 |> select(lon, lat, ptot) |> rename(cv = ptot)
    cv_df2 <- df2 |> select(lon, lat, ptot) |> rename(cv = ptot)
    cv_title <- paste("Precipitation Changes", cpa_lbl, " vs ", crp_lbl)
    all_colors <- brewer.pal(11, "PRGn")
    cv_colors <- all_colors[3:7]
    cv_units <- "mm"
  }
  join_df <- cv_df1 |>
    select(lat, lon, cv) |>
    rename(cv1 = cv) |>
    inner_join(cv_df2  |> 
    select(lat, lon, cv)  |> 
    rename(cv2 = cv), by = c("lat", "lon")) |> 
    mutate(cvdiff = cv2 - cv1) |> 
    select(lon, lat, cvdiff)
  qs <- quantile(join_df$cvdiff, 
                probs = seq(0, 1, length.out = 6),
                na.rm = TRUE)
  labs <- sprintf("[%.1f, %.1f]", qs[-length(qs)], qs[-1])
  plot_df <- join_df |>
    mutate(
      p_bin = cut(
        cvdiff,
        breaks = qs,
        include.lowest = TRUE,
        right = TRUE,
        labels = labs
      )
    )  
    
  cv_plt <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = lon, y = lat, fill = p_bin)) +
    geom_raster(alpha = 0.85) +
    geom_sf(data = coastline_sf,
      color = "black", linewidth = 0.15,
      inherit.aes= FALSE, show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = cv_colors,
      name = cv_units, 
      na.translate = FALSE,
      guide = guide_legend(
        reverse = TRUE,       # high value bin at top
        override.aes = list(
          alpha = 0.85,        # legend bins semi-transparent
          colour = "black",   # legend bins outline
          size = 0.4          # legend bins outline line width
        )   
      )   
    ) +
    coord_sf(expand=FALSE) +
    labs(
      title = cv_title,
      x = "",
      y = "") +
    theme_minimal() +
    # make legend bins boxes
    theme(legend.key = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA)) 
}
p1t_exp_t_chg <- fn_cv_chg_vis(crp_cn_df, cpa_cn_df, "t")
p1t_exp_p_chg <- fn_cv_chg_vis(crp_cn_df, cpa_cn_df, "p")
p1t_exp_t_chg
p1t_exp_p_chg 
```

## Setup

### Packages

```{r setup}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(sf)
  library(arrow)
  library(units)
  library(gt)
  library(RColorBrewer)
  library(viridis)
  library(scales) # for cut_number
})
```

### Climate Periods

```{r climate-periods}

# Climatological Standard Reference Period Normals
crp_beg <- 1961
crp_end <- 1990
crp_lbl <- paste("CRP ", crp_beg, "-", crp_end, sep = "")

# Climatological Period Average
cpa_beg <- 2011
cpa_end <- 2020
cpa_lbl <- paste("CPA ", cpa_beg, "-", cpa_end, sep = "")
```

### Paths

```{r paths}
dir_transform <- "_data/2-transform/"
```

### Read transformed data

```{r read-crp-saved-data}

cp <- "crp"

pth <- paste(dir_transform, cp, "-nc-summary.csv", sep = "")
crp_nc_summary_df <- read_csv(pth, show_col_types = FALSE) 

pth <- paste(dir_transform, cp, "-monthly-data-t.parquet", sep = "")
crp_t_df <- read_parquet(pth) 
pth <- paste(dir_transform, cp, "-monthly-data-p.parquet", sep = "")
crp_p_df <- read_parquet(pth) 
pth <- paste(dir_transform, cp, "-average-stats-t.parquet", sep = "")
crp_t_stats_df <- read_parquet(pth) 
pth <- paste(dir_transform, cp, "-average-stats-p.parquet", sep = "")
crp_p_stats_df <- read_parquet(pth) 
pth <- paste(dir_transform, cp, "-climate-normals.parquet", sep = "")
crp_cn_df <- read_parquet(pth)

pth <- paste(dir_transform, cp, "-nc-summary.csv", sep = "")
crp_nc_summary_df <- read_csv(pth, show_col_types = FALSE) 

pth <- paste(dir_transform, cp, "-monthly-data-t.parquet", sep = "")

pth <- paste(dir_transform, cp, "-average-stats-t.parquet", sep = "")

pth <- paste(dir_transform, cp, "-average-stats-p.parquet", sep = "")

```


## Explore data

```{r summary-table-data}

joined_df <- crp_t_df %>%
  select(lat, lon, mth, t) %>%
  rename(t1 = t) %>%
  inner_join(cpa_t_df %>% select(lat, lon, mth, t) %>% rename(t2 = t),
             by = c("lat", "lon", "mth")) %>%
  inner_join(crp_p_df %>% select(lat, lon, mth, p) %>% rename(p1 = p),
             by = c("lat", "lon", "mth")) %>%
  inner_join(cpa_p_df %>% select(lat, lon, mth, p) %>% rename(p2 = p),
             by = c("lat", "lon", "mth"))

fn_create_summary_table_4x <- function (df, title, subtitle, lbl1, lbl2) {

  summary_df <- tibble(
    Metric = c(
      "Data points",
      "Max longitude",
      "Min longitude",
      "Max latitude",
      "Min latitude",
      "Climate Variable Avg",
      "Climate Variable Max",
      "Climate Variable Min"
    ),
    CRP_t = c(
      nrow(df),
      max(df$lon, na.rm = TRUE),
      min(df$lon, na.rm = TRUE),
      max(df$lat, na.rm = TRUE),
      min(df$lat, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean(df$t1, na.rm = TRUE),
      max(df$t1, na.rm = TRUE),
      min(df$t1, na.rm = TRUE)
    ),
    CPA_t = c(
      nrow(df),
      max(df$lon, na.rm = TRUE),
      min(df$lon, na.rm = TRUE),
      max(df$lat, na.rm = TRUE),
      min(df$lat, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean(df$t2, na.rm = TRUE),
      max(df$t2, na.rm = TRUE),
      min(df$t2, na.rm = TRUE)
    ),
    CRP_p = c(
      nrow(df),
      max(df$lon, na.rm = TRUE),
      min(df$lon, na.rm = TRUE),
      max(df$lat, na.rm = TRUE),
      min(df$lat, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean(df$p1, na.rm = TRUE),
      max(df$p1, na.rm = TRUE),
      min(df$p1, na.rm = TRUE)
    ),
    CPA_p = c(
      nrow(df),
      max(df$lon, na.rm = TRUE),
      min(df$lon, na.rm = TRUE),
      max(df$lat, na.rm = TRUE),
      min(df$lat, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean(df$p2, na.rm = TRUE),
      max(df$p2, na.rm = TRUE),
      min(df$p2, na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  )
 
  summary_tbl <- summary_df %>%
    gt() %>%
      fmt_number(
        columns = c(CRP_t, CPA_t, CRP_p , CPA_p),
        decimals = 0,
        use_seps = TRUE,
          rows = Metric == "Total rows"
      ) %>%
      fmt_number(
        columns = c(CRP_t, CPA_t, CRP_p , CPA_p),
        decimals = 2,
        rows = Metric %in% c(
          "Max longitude", "Min longitude",
          "Max latitude", "Min latitude"
        )
      ) %>%
      fmt_number(
        columns = c(CRP_t, CPA_t, CRP_p , CPA_p),
        decimals = 3,
        rows = Metric %in% c(
          "Climate Variable Avg",
          "Climate Variable Max",
          "Climate Variable Min"
        )
      ) %>%
      tab_spanner(
        label = "Temperature (°C)",
        columns = c(CRP_t,CPA_t)
      ) %>%
      tab_spanner(
        label = "Precipitation (mm)",
        columns = c(CRP_p,CPA_p)
      ) %>%
      cols_label(
        CRP_t = lbl1,
        CPA_t = lbl2,
        CRP_p = lbl1,
        CPA_p = lbl2
      ) %>%
      tab_header(
        title = title
        # ,
        # subtitle = subtitle
      ) %>%
      tab_style(
        style = list(
          cell_fill(color = "lightyellow")
        ),
        locations = cells_body(
          rows = Metric %in% c(
            "Climate Variable Avg"
          )
        )
      )

  return(summary_tbl)
}

title <- "Summary of Input Climate Variables"
lbl1 <- crp_lbl
lbl2 <- cpa_lbl
tbl1_gt <- fn_create_summary_table_4x(joined_df, title, subtitle, lbl1, lbl2)
tbl1_gt

```

```{r expl-cv-plot}
fn_explore_cv_plot <- function(df, cp) {
```

```{r expl-cv-plot-chg}
p1t_exp_t_chg <- fn_cv_chg_vis(crp_cn_df, cpa_cn_df, "t")
p1t_exp_p_chg <- fn_cv_chg_vis(crp_cn_df, cpa_cn_df, "p")
p1t_exp_t_chg
p1t_exp_p_chg 
```
